texto: Neuroscience is fast developing the technical and conceptual wherewithal to reveal in fine, bare detail the neurobiological substrates of the mind. Perhaps it will despoil a sacred myth - the myth of selfhood and souls. And, if so, we may be wandering innocently into the opening phase of a dangerous game. Our ethics and systems of justice, our entire moral order, are founded on the notion of society as a collective of individual selves - autonomous, introspective, accountable agents. If this self-reflective, moral agent is revealed to be illusory, then what?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Paul Broks que provoca temas ligados a reflexao. Ao questionar “Neuroscience is fast developing the technical and conceptual wherewithal to reveal in fine, bare …”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, brain, consciousness, com foco em dia-chuvoso e consciousness.
